turns.speaker: assistant
turns.text:
1. Competition with other repair shops: There is likely to be competition from other repair shops offering similar services, which could impact the demand for my services and make it more challenging to attract and retain customers.

2. Limited tools: Having a limited set of tools could be a disadvantage as it may restrict the number of repairs I am able to carry out. This could limit my ability to offer a wide range of services to customers and make it difficult for me to meet their needs.

3. Finding a following: Building a following and establishing a reputation can be challenging, particularly in a competitive market.  It may take time and effort to create a loyal customer base, and this will require effective marketing and promotion, strong customer service skills, and a dedication to providing high-quality repairs.
